mapper.sql: select id, study_id, orthanc_series_id, series_instance_uid, series_number, series_description, modality, body_part_examined, instance_count, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag from dcm_series
mapper.insert: insert into dcm_series (study_id, orthanc_series_id, series_instance_uid, series_number, series_description, modality, body_part_examined, instance_count, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag) values (#{studyId}, #{orthancSeriesId}, #{seriesInstanceUid}, #{seriesNumber}, #{seriesDescription}, #{modality}, #{bodyPartExamined}, #{instanceCount}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{delFlag})
mapper.update: update dcm_series set study_id = #{studyId}, orthanc_series_id = #{orthancSeriesId}, series_number = #{seriesNumber}, series_description = #{seriesDescription}, modality = #{modality}, body_part_examined = #{bodyPartExamined}, instance_count = #{instanceCount}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), del_flag = #{delFlag} where id = #{id}
update dcm_series set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where study_id = #{studyId} and del_flag = '0'
